channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-554] add gnilnd awareness to LNet
item.description: Duplicate of Bugzilla ticket, can we have the gni patch included in 1.8.x please?

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
The b2_1 version is in:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,2449
Can we land this to b2_1 too? Let us know and we can push to gerrit.

Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » i686,client,el5,inkernel #172
LU-554 LNet: add gnilnd awareness to LNet (Revision 2064ce3bae740e3c0de92ae7f265bb0c2d27b3d3)

Result = SUCCESS
Johann Lombardi : 2064ce3bae740e3c0de92ae7f265bb0c2d27b3d3

Oops. I was wrong, the oracle branch had it only

While building a whamcloud 1.8 release I discovered that LU-554 is already applied to the tree. Chris you can abandon the patches and close this ticket. See git commit 184b52d5632908fbf6fef4ed85a02a5bb53c34f9

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1179
Patch didn't pass Maloo, but looks like both failures, ost-pools test 14 and obdfilter-survey test 1b, are existing bugs LU-797 and LU-746 respectively.

http://review.whamcloud.com/2071
This patch also saw a failure, ost-pools test 23, which looks a lot like LU-745. However, this was supposed to be fixed in b1_8 back in december, so I wonder if the patch landed for LU-745 was effective.

Submitted to Gerrit for b1_8.

http://review.whamcloud.com/2071

Edit - Sorry, I messed up the commit message, so I re-submitted. Used same change-id as the original b1_8 patch.

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1179
It looks like Oracle landed this for their 1.8.7 release; can we get it pushed to WC's b1_8?
Landed for 2.2

Landed for 2.2

Lai

Can you please take care of landing this patch

Thanks

Peter

This is the 2.1 version:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1285
ok Cory. I will get someone to kick this off again. It does indeed look like LU531 so unrelated to your patch.
The Maloo test failed for submitted patch, but it seems like a transient failure to me. Can we kick-off Maloo testing again?

change for b1_8 is in:

http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1179
Nic pushed the patch to bz 23884 attachment 31892. I just asked for landing permission to 1.8.7 there. If you still need us to push to gerrit separately, we can do that.

James

It looks like Nic Henke was the patch author so it should really be either him or at least someone from Cray who uploads the patch into gerrit

Peter
Ashley I can submit the patch to gerrit for you if you want from the above bugzilla. We have been running it for awhile at the lab as well.

If there are any patch contributions that people would like landed then the author (or someone else who has the rights to assign the copyright) should upload the patch into gerrit. As I understand it, Cray have been targeting landing all the GNI changes into a 2.x release and this is tracked by tickets LU-443 to LU-449
Or even better integrate the Gemini driver into the 1.8 whamcloud branch. I have such a patch.
